spec_match.rationale: The feature behavior is unchanged and remains aligned with its platform contract.

interactive.rationale: Every visible control was exercised in the direct browser run.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The interaction continues to match the concept description.

edge_cases.rationale: Generated and rerendered controls retain stable accessible names.

design_system.rationale: The change uses semantic naming without altering the visual system.

accessibility.rationale: Every detected native or ARIA control now has a programmatic accessible name; toggle state is exposed where applicable.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct same-origin browser validation found no unnamed controls. Clipboard-only write denials in unfocused automated frames are environment restrictions, not hidden failures.

summary: Named every generated strategy comparison control. Accessibility recheck passed.
